items.prompt: Adjacent K-map cells differ by how many bits?
items.explain: Gray-code layout: neighbors change one variable.

items.prompt: Grouping four 1s in a K-map typically removes how many literals from the product term?
items.explain: A quad eliminates two variables in the grouped term.

choices: Can join groups if they help minimization
items.explain: X can be treated as 0 or 1 to enlarge groups.

items.prompt: Edge cells on a K-map can wrap with opposite edges for grouping.
items.explain: Top/bottom and left/right neighbors include wrap-around.
